headline: a.k.a. Brands Sees Q1 Sales Growth, Raises 2026 Guidance
summary: By Karen Roman a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. (NYSE: AKA) said first quarter net sales rose 3% to $132.5 million compared to $128.7 million the year prior Adjusted EBITDA was $5.1 million, or 3.9% of net sales, compared to $2.7 million, or 2.1% of net sales the previous year, the company stated. a.k.a. headline: At Multi Year Lows, Michael Burry Is Loading Up On Lululemon Athletica (LULU) Stock
summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) is one of the 9 Stocks Big Short’s Michael Burry Is Betting On. headline: Is Heidi O’Neill exactly what Lululemon needs?
summary: Negative opinions have proliferated since she was named to the top spot, but analysts say critiques are overblown.
